mapper.sql: select id, study_id, series_id, orthanc_instance_id, sop_instance_uid, instance_number, sop_class_uid, image_type, `rows`, `columns`, pixel_spacing, slice_location, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, del_flag from dcm_instance
mapper.insert: insert into dcm_instance (study_id, series_id, orthanc_instance_id, sop_instance_uid, instance_number, sop_class_uid, image_type, `rows`, `columns`, pixel_spacing, slice_location, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, del_flag) values (#{studyId}, #{seriesId}, #{orthancInstanceId}, #{sopInstanceUid}, #{instanceNumber}, #{sopClassUid}, #{imageType}, #{rows}, #{columns}, #{pixelSpacing}, #{sliceLocation}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{updateBy}, sysdate(), #{delFlag})
mapper.update: update dcm_instance set study_id = #{studyId}, series_id = #{seriesId}, orthanc_instance_id = #{orthancInstanceId}, instance_number = #{instanceNumber}, sop_class_uid = #{sopClassUid}, image_type = #{imageType}, `rows` = #{rows}, `columns` = #{columns}, pixel_spacing = #{pixelSpacing}, slice_location = #{sliceLocation}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate(), del_flag = #{delFlag} where id = #{id}
update dcm_instance set del_flag = '2', update_time = sysdate() where study_id = #{studyId} and del_flag = '0'
